title: connections
text: connections Set the number of concurrent connections the connector is allowed to maintain. USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = connections: Number USYS$ Mnemonic _PARAMS = oc: Number Use Applies to Mnemonic Connector Syntax MS SQL connector MSS USYS$MSS_PARAMS PostgreSQL PGS USYS$PGS_PARAMS Description If this setting is not specified, the connector defaults to 16 concurrent connections. Multiple parallel connections can be created by using entity-to-path mappings. For example: $MSS1 = mss:ROSE.repository|| $MSS2 = mss:ROSE.repository|| *.DICT $MSS1:*.* *.PRATT $MSS2:*.* Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
